# protonpass_item_credit_card (Data Source)

Reads a specific Proton Pass credit card item.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "protonpass_item_credit_card" "example" {
  item_id  = "item_id_here"
  share_id = "share_id_here"
}

output "cardholder" {
  value = data.protonpass_item_credit_card.example.cardholder_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `item_id` (String) Item ID.
- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault.

### Read-Only

- `cardholder_name` (String) Cardholder Name.
- `create_time` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `expiration_date` (String) Expiration Date.
- `modify_time` (String) Last modification timestamp.
- `number` (String, Sensitive) Card Number.
- `pin` (String, Sensitive) PIN.
- `title` (String) Title of the item.
- `verification_number` (String, Sensitive) Verification Number (CVV).
